name: Summer Camp
author: Anon
bootlegger: Once per game, one good player and one evil player receive a secret goal. If the evil player completes their goal, all evil players join a private nighttime “campfire” chat. If the good player completes their goal, any number of good players join a private nighttime chat. One evil player may also be invited to join the good players, but their alignment is not revealed during the chat.
